text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm taking a walk along the river, when...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: HEEEEEY! GET BACK HERE!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
YOU CAN'T RUN, MCQUEEN! I KNOW WHAT
YOU'VE DONE!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Is she going to chase me all day?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey! Admit it! Admit to your crimes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-never! I didn't do anything!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Is that how it's going to be? Then I'll do it for you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You sneakily finished off all the cake! Even
though you're supposed to be on a diet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Agh! No! Please, say no more!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Look, I'm not a monster. I won't rat you out to your trainer. However...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There is one thing you need to know... You
listening?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Salmon! You must learn from and live by the
salmon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...See, the thing about salmon is they spend their
lives swimming upstream.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, that doesn't make sense to us, does it? I
mean, why tire yourself out like that?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But the salmon still do it... And do you know
why?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Uhh... no? What are you on about, anyway?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The salmon see adversity as opportunity! A
chance to grow and realize their potential!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So, swim upstream! Just like the salmon! BE the
salmon!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So you ate the last of the cake—fine! But you
should use this chance to work on yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Time to burn that cake's calories... No, make that
two cakes' worth! Then you're on your way to
being an incredible runner!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes... Yes, you're right!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I am merely a student of the salmon myself. I still
have yet to reach their level of zen.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
However, one day it will happen! I shall face
adversity as the salmon do and become a mighty
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
To that end, I run! Until that day when my dreams
finally come true...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship... I finally understand what you're
trying to say!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume should always keep their fighting
passion... and they should always view challenges
as opportunities!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Which is why I'll use these calories to run, and—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh! I think I see Flash over there!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
HALT! TODAY'S THE DAY I FINALLY EAT MORE
SAUSAGES THAN YOUUU!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wha—hey! Gold Ship?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Well, I see what fighting passion looks like
now, but you must learn to remain calm!
